prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年辽宁大学在天津市综合科类最低录取位次分别为10145→10116→12621→12029→11105名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年出现明显后移（12621名），2024年略有回升（12029名），2025年再次前移至11105名，近两年呈前移态势，但整体仍高于2021–2022年水平。2025年基准位次约11105名；2021–2025年该校在天津市综合科类招生计划分别为25、26、26、26、26人，近四年稳定在26人。2026年招生计划大幅扩增至48人，较2025年增加22人，增幅约84.6%，属于显著扩招。大幅扩招将直接降低录取竞争烈度，使最低录取位次明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名稳定在124–131名区间，学校综合实力与品牌认知度在211高校中处于中游偏上水平；该校在2021–2026年声誉监测中均未出现明显舆情事件，声誉平稳；抖音学校热度排名第105位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量偏低，报考关注度处于中等偏低水平；投档异常文件中亦无该校断档或暴跌记录，录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，辽宁大学应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科。该校在天津市招生的经济学类、财政学、国际经济与贸易、会计学等专业均与这一优势学科高度关联，对经管类方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业涉及经济学类、财政学、会计学、工商管理类、汉语言文学、纪检监察、外语类等。2024年专业热度数据显示，金融/财经/经济类评估为"分化观望"，会计/财务/审计类为"推荐"，法学类为"分化观望"，整体经管类专业热度趋于分化但仍有基本盘。天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人（含不确定标注），较2025年71938人增加约10062人，增幅约14%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，属于东北地区高校。天津考生对东北地区高校的地域偏好相对一般，但辽宁大学作为211高校性价比尚可，对中等分数段考生仍有一定吸引力。该校在天津市的招生计划从26人扩至48人，扩招幅度大，可能进一步吸引更多考生关注。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11105名、2026年招生计划大幅扩增84.6%（从26人增至48人）、天津市考生总数增加约14%以及学校声誉平稳等因素，扩招带来的竞争缓解效应远大于考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约16793名，区间16293–17293名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年辽宁大学在天津市大幅扩招至48人，预计最低录取位次将后移至约16793名（区间16293–17293名）。位次在16000名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（财政学、会计学、经济学类）；位次在16000–17000名之间的考生以二档专业为主力填报区间；位次在17000名以后的考生可考虑三档专业保底。该校应用经济学A-学科优势明显，经管类专业整体性价比突出，适合对财经方向有兴趣的考生重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Liaoning University in Tianjin's comprehensive subject category were 10145 → 10116 → 12621 → 12029 → 11105, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (12621), with a slight recovery in 2024 (12029), and a forward shift again in 2025 to 11105, indicating a forward trend in the last two years, but still higher than the 2021–2022 levels. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11105. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin's comprehensive subject category was 25, 26, 26, 26, 26 students, stable at 26 in the last four years. In 2026, the enrollment plan significantly expands to 48 students, an increase of 22 students compared to 2025, an increase of about 84.6%, which is a notable expansion. This substantial expansion will directly reduce the intensity of admission competition, causing the minimum admission ranking to shift significantly backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 125th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 124–131 in recent years. The university's comprehensive strength and brand recognition are at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. From 2021 to 2026, no significant public opinion incidents were detected in reputation monitoring, indicating a stable reputation. The university's Douyin popularity ranking is 105th, with an evaluation of 'average,' indicating relatively low exposure on short video platforms and moderately low application attention. There are no records of sudden drops or crashes in the admission abnormal files, suggesting a relatively stable admission trend. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Liaoning University's Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. The majors offered in Tianjin, such as Economics, Public Finance, International Economics and Trade, and Accounting, are highly related to this advantageous discipline, attracting some students interested in economics and management.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's admission majors include Economics, Public Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Chinese Language and Literature, Discipline Inspection and Supervision, and Foreign Languages. According to 2024 major popularity data, Finance/Finance/Economics categories are evaluated as 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' Accounting/Finance/Auditing as 'recommended,' and Law as 'differentiated and wait-and-see.' Overall, the popularity of economics and management majors tends to differentiate but still has a basic market. In 2026, the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Tianjin is approximately 82,000 (including uncertain marks), an increase of about 10,062 compared to 71,938 in 2025, an increase of about 14%, indicating a significant expansion in the number of candidates and intensified overall competition. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, belonging to the Northeast region. Tianjin candidates have relatively average regional preferences for Northeast universities, but as a 211 university, Liaoning University offers good value for money and still attracts some candidates in the middle score range. The enrollment plan in Tianjin has expanded from 26 to 48 students, a large increase, which may further attract more candidates' attention.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11105, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of 84.6% (from 26 to 48 students), the approximately 14% increase in the number of candidates in Tianjin, and the stable university reputation, the competition relief effect from the expansion far outweighs the competition intensification effect from the increase in candidates. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift significantly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16793, with a range of 16293–17293.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Liaoning University significantly expands its enrollment in Tianjin to 48 students, and the minimum admission ranking is expected to shift backward to approximately 16793 (range 16293–17293). Candidates with rankings within 16000 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Public Finance, Accounting, Economics); candidates with rankings between 16000 and 17000 should mainly consider Tier 2 majors as their primary application range; candidates with rankings above 17000 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. The university's Applied Economics A- discipline advantage is clear, and the overall cost-effectiveness of economics and management majors is prominent, making it suitable for candidates interested in finance and economics to consider seriously.
